LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT DEBORAH DENOIA, CHARLES HEMMINGER'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. RESPONDENTS DEBORAH DENOIA AND CHARLES HEMMINGER'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED AND THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 16, 2019 FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF AN ARBITRATOR IN THE EVENT THAT THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE BEFORE THEN REGARDING THE PERSON TO BE SELECTED AS THEIR ARBITRATOR. THE PARTIES ARE WELCOME, BUT NOT REQUIRED, TO SUBMIT NAMES OF PROPOSED ARBITRATORS TO THE COURT BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES NO LATER THAN JANUARY 14, 2019. THE ARBITRATOR AND THE PARTIES SHOULD DETERMINE A SCHEDULE FOR THE ARBITRATION, WHICH SHOULD NOT BE ARBITRARILY IMPOSED BY THE COURT. PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY PERSUASIVE REASON WHY THE ARBITRATION SHOULD NOT MOVE FORWARD EXPEDITIOUSLY. IF STATE FARM BELIEVES THAT IT NEEDS FURTHER TIME FOR DISCOVERY, STATE FARM SHOULD SO INFORM THE ARBITRATOR. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

PETITIONER TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. calendar.matters:
Respondents Deborah Denoia And Charles Hemminger'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Barry Brown, Esq. 650-871-9544 for Petitioner through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Petitioner reports they have picked Charles Hawkins as the arbitrator. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Respondents Deborah Denoia And Charles Hemminger'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Hearing.

The Court appoints Charles Hawkins as arbitrator based on parties stipulation.

Petitioner to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Petition To Compel Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Guy O. Kornblum In Support Of Respondents' Petition
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT DEBORAH DENOIA, CHARLES HEMMINGER's Petition To Compel Arbitration.

Respondents Deborah DeNoia and Charles Hemminger's petition to compel arbitration is granted and the hearing is continued to January 16, 2019 for the appointment of an arbitrator in the event that the parties cannot agree before then regarding the person to be selected as their arbitrator. The parties are welcome, but not required, to submit names of proposed arbitrators to the court by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties no later than January 14, 2019. The arbitrator and the parties should determine a schedule for the arbitration, which should not be arbitrarily imposed by the court. Petitioner State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company has not provided any persuasive reason why the arbitration should not move forward expeditiously. If State Farm believes that it needs further time for discovery, State Farm should so inform the arbitrator.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
